title: Project Exception & Bottleneck Monitor
sub: Monitor breakdowns and bottlenecks (stale orders, quality drops, or technical errors) to improve performance.
empty: Excellent! Your project is running smoothly with no detected bottlenecks
accessDenied: Access denied. Owner and Ops Manager only.
loadError: Failed to load project issues log

selfHealing.note: System self-healing detected: Resolved technical/script error automatically after verifying stability
selfHealing.toast: Self-healing notification: System detected and resolved ({count}) technical issues automatically!

technical.title: [UI Error] {message}
technical.description: This error was sent automatically to platform admins for updates.

customer.title: [Bottleneck / Delay] Order #{order} stuck in reception for over 24 hours
customer.detail: Action: Direct cleaning or reception station to process immediately.

financial.title: [Pending Financial Review] Order #{order} proof needs auditing
